introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Anaheim, The Azizi Firm is here to help. As home to Disneyland Resort, Angel Stadium, and the Honda Center, Anaheim sees millions of visitors annually alongside its dense local population, creating significant accident risks. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Anaheim car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions on I-5 and SR-91, T-bone accidents at major intersections, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents which are extremely common near Disneyland, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents in the Resort District, and bicycle accidents.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Anaheim
sections.body: Anaheim's mix of heavy tourism traffic and local commuters creates unique accident risks on I-5, SR-91, and SR-57. Common causes include distracted tourists unfamiliar with local roads, aggressive driving near event venues, rideshare pickup and drop-off chaos near Disneyland, DUI driving after events at Angel Stadium or Honda Center, and congestion-related rear-end collisions during rush hour. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Anaheim?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene thoroughly, exchange information with all drivers including out-of-state visitors, get witness contacts (which may be tourists who will soon leave the area), and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies.

faq.question: How much is my Anaheim car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Cases involving out-of-state drivers may involve additional legal complexities. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We have extensive experience with Orange County courts and understand how to handle cases involving tourists and out-of-state defendants.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Anaheim, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
